A Message From The Heart 💌

Hey Selvi (a.k.a. my little Piggy 🐷),

I know you pretend to be tough, but on the inside you are the softest, sweetest, most wonderful person I know. Today is your day — a day as bright and colourful as you are. May every single wish you make today come true, and may this year bring you more joy, love, and laughter than you can even imagine.

You deserve the whole world, and I hope it knows that too. 🌸

With all my love 💖
🕯️🎂🕯️

Make a wish, Selvi! 🌠

Happy Birthday • With Love • Always 💕
